name: HNAC Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HNAC Technology Co., Ltd. provides EPC services and automation solutions to hydropower stations, substations, pump station, and water treatment projects in China and internationally. Its products include hydropower automatic systems, pump station automatic systems, intelligent distribution automate systems, water treatment systems, industrial process control systems, DCS control systems, solar power systems, and computer monitoring and control systems. It also offers engineering services, such as pre project consultation, project construction, personnel training, financing plan management, debugging, project design, quality control and assurance, and quality service and warranty, as well as procurement, logistics, and installation of complete sets of equipment. HNAC Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.
